article.title: Fitbit Air reportedly launching May 16, could cost around $100 with several bands & colors
article.summary: Over the weekend, we first reported the name of Google’s Whoop competitor as “Fitbit Air,” and now more details are coming out, including potential pricing, release date, and colors. more…
article.title_zh: Fitbit Air 傳將於 5 月 16 日上市，售價約 $100
article.summary_zh: Google Fitbit Air 競品傳將於 5 月 16 日上市，售價約 $100，並提供多款錶帶和顏色選項。

article.title: US opens refund portal to start paying back Trump's illegal tariffs
article.summary: The US government today opened an online portal for submitting tariff refund requests, two months after the Supreme Court ruled that President Trump illegally imposed the International Emergency Economic Powers Act (IEEPA) tariffs. The refunds will be paid to importers and customs brokers, while consumers who paid higher prices because of the tariffs won't necessarily get anything back. US Customs and Border Protection (CBP) opened the Consolidated Administration and Processing of Entries (CAPE) portal for IEEPA refunds. "Importers and authorized customs brokers can now file their CAPE Declarations," said a CBP bulletin issued today . Over 330,000 importers paid a total of $166 billion in IEEPA duties as of March 4, a March 6 court filing by a CBP trade office official said. Despite moving
article.title_zh: 美國開設退款門戶網站開始返還 Trump 非法關稅
article.summary_zh: 美國政府今日開設線上門戶網站提交關稅退款申請，距最高法院裁定 Trump 違法徵收 IEEPA 關稅已兩個月。

article.title: TP-Link seeks to secure conditional approval from FCC following router import ban — company stresses it is no longer Chinese-owned
article.summary: TP-Link, one of the most popular consumer router brands in the U.S., met with FCC officials to discuss how it can secure a conditional approval to continue introducing and selling new routers.
article.title_zh: TP-Link 尋求 FCC 條件批准以繞過路由器進口禁令——公司強調已不再為中資所有
article.summary_zh: 美國最受歡迎的路由器品牌之一 TP-Link 與 FCC 官員會面，討論如何獲得條件批准以繼續推出和銷售新路由器。

article.title: Moody’s Lifts Thai Outlook to Stable on Easing Tariff Shocks
article.summary: Moody’s Ratings upgraded Thailand’s credit outlook to stable from negative, citing easing downside risks from US tariffs and improved domestic investment momentum. The sovereign rating was affirmed at Baa1.
article.title_zh: 穆迪將泰國展望調升至穩定,因關稅衝擊趨緩
article.summary_zh: 穆迪評級將泰國信用展望從負面調升至穩定,主權評等維持在Baa1。

article.title: Report: Meta will train AI agents by tracking employees' mouse, keyboard use
article.summary: Meta will begin tracking the mouse movements, clicks, and keystrokes of its US employees to generate high-quality training data for future AI agents, Reuters reports . The news organization cites internal memos posted by the Meta Superintelligence Labs team in reporting on the new Model Capability Initiative employee-tracking software. That software will operate on specific work-related apps and websites and also make use of periodic screenshots to provide context for the AI training, according to the memo. "This is where all Meta employees can help our models get better simply by doing their daily work," the memo reads, in part, Reuters reports. Read full article Comments
article.title_zh: 報告：Meta將透過追蹤員工的滑鼠和鍵盤使用情況來訓練AI代理
article.summary_zh: 據路透社報導，Meta將開始追蹤其美國員工的滑鼠移動、點擊和按鍵操作，以生成用於未來AI代理的高品質訓練數據。Meta Superintelligence Labs團隊發佈的內部備忘錄報導了這一新的Model Capability Initiative。

article.title: Beating the heat with on-prem/edge solutions: how precision liquid cooling enables AI to run anywhere
article.summary: The speakers will explain how this innovative solution enables high performance/low complexity AI infrastructure deployment.
article.title_zh: 利用內部部署/邊緣解決方案對抗熱量：精密液體冷卻如何在任何地方實現 AI 運行
article.summary_zh: 講者將說明這項創新解決方案如何實現高效能且低複雜度的 AI 基礎設施部署。

article.title: Anthropic nuked a company's access to Claude, stopping 60 employees dead in their tracks — support via Google Form is the only recourse for vague usage policy violation
article.summary: Anthropic nukes a company's access to Claude, stopping 60 employees dead in their tracks on the back of a "usage policy violation."
article.title_zh: Anthropic 撤銷一家公司的 Claude 存取權——60 名員工瞬間停工，僅能透過 Google 表單尋求支援應對模糊的使用政策違規
article.summary_zh: Anthropic 因「使用政策違規」撤銷一家公司的 Claude 存取權，導致 60 名員工瞬間停工。

article.title: 雲端開發平臺Vercel資料外洩，起因是員工使用的第三方AI工具遭駭
article.summary:
雲端開發平臺Vercel傳出遭遇資安事故，有駭客聲稱從該公司竊得一批內部資料，並尋找買家兜售。由於Vercel供應開發人員主機與開發基礎設施的雲端平臺，影響範圍可能非常廣泛。
4月19日Vercel發布資安公告，指出他們的內部系統遭到未經授權存取，有部分用戶未加密儲存的非敏感環境變數遭駭，該公司也通知這些用戶，呼籲立即輪替相關憑證。
article.title_zh: 雲端開發平臺Vercel資料外洩，起因是員工使用的第三方AI工具遭駭
article.summary_zh:
雲端開發平臺Vercel傳出遭遇資安事故，有駭客聲稱從該公司竊得一批內部資料，並尋找買家兜售。由於Vercel供應開發人員主機與開發基礎設施的雲端平臺，影響範圍可能非常廣泛。
4月19日Vercel發布資安公告，指出他們的內部系統遭到未經授權存取，有部分用戶未加密儲存的非敏感環境變數遭駭，該公司也通知這些用戶，呼籲立即輪替相關憑證。

article.title: Framework’s overhauled Laptop 13 Pro brings a redesigned chassis — Intel Core Ultra Series 3 system aims to be a 'MacBook Pro for Linux users'
article.summary: The Framework Laptop 13 Pro is the company's first redesign of its chassis, with CNC aluminum, a haptic touchpad, larger battery, and an option for pre-loaded Ubuntu.
article.title_zh: Framework 重新設計的 Laptop 13 Pro 搭載 Intel Core Ultra Series 3——瞄準成為『Linux 用戶的 MacBook Pro』
article.summary_zh: Framework Laptop 13 Pro 是該公司首次重新設計機殼，採用 CNC 鋁合金、觸覺觸控板、更大電池，並提供預裝 Ubuntu 選項。

article.title: AI research lab NeoCognition lands $40M seed to build agents that learn like humans
article.summary: Founded by an OSU researcher, the startup is developing AI agents that can become experts in any domain.
article.title_zh: AI 研究實驗室 NeoCognition 獲得 4000 萬美元種子輪融資，開發像人類一樣學習的智能代理
article.summary_zh: 由俄亥俄州立大學研究人員創辦的初創公司正在開發能在任何領域成為專家的 AI 代理。

article.title: Bond, a new social media platform, wants to use AI to help you kick your doomscrolling habit
article.summary: Bond wants you to get off the couch and get back into the real world, its creator says. The new platform's AI system is designed to motivate users to do things away from the app.
article.title_zh: 新社交媒體平台 Bond 想用 AI 幫助您戒除無限滾動的習慣
article.summary_zh: Bond 的創造者表示，該平台想讓用戶遠離沙發，回到現實世界，其 AI 系統旨在激勵用戶進行應用程式外的活動。

article.title: Anthropic takes $5B from Amazon and pledges $100B in cloud spending in return
article.summary: Amazon has made another circular AI deal: It's investing another $5 billion in Anthropic. Anthropic has agreed to spend $100 billion on AWS in return.
article.title_zh: Anthropic 獲得 Amazon 50 億美元投資，承諾在雲端服務上花費 1000 億美元
article.summary_zh: Amazon 向 Anthropic 追加投資 50 億美元，Anthropic 同意在 AWS 上花費 1000 億美元作為回報。

article.title: Google Bets on New Chips to Boost AI Results, Challenging Nvidia
article.summary: In a matter of months, Google’s AI chips have become one of the hottest commodities in the tech sector. Leading artificial intelligence developers, including some of the firm’s biggest rivals, are stocking up on them. Now, the Alphabet Inc.-owned company aims to build on its momentum with the likely introduction of new chips dedicated to inference, or running AI models after they’ve been trained. With this push, Google is poised to further challenge market leader Nvidia Corp. in a fast-growing category for semiconductors that’s fueled by surging adoption of AI software. Bloomberg News AI Infrastructure Reporter Dina Bass joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss. She speaks with Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: Google 押注新晶片提升人工智能成果 挑戰 Nvidia
article.summary_zh: 在短短數月內，Google 的人工智能晶片已成為科技產業最熱門的商品，包括其主要競爭對手在內的領先人工智能開發商都在囤積它們。

article.title: Google to Release New AI Chips, Challenging Nvidia | Bloomberg Tech 4/20/2026
article.summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss Google’s plans for new AI chips focused on inference. Plus, Blue Origin successfully launches and lands a reusable booster for its New Glenn rocket but fails to place its payload satellite in the correct orbit, sending shares of AST SpaceMobile sinking. And, Cerebras plans an IPO, months after withdrawing a previous attempt at a public listing. (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: Google 發布新人工智能晶片 挑戰 Nvidia | Bloomberg Tech 4/20/2026
article.summary_zh: Bloomberg 的 Caroline Hyde 和 Ed Ludlow 討論 Google 推出專注於推論的新人工智能晶片計畫，以及 Blue Origin 成功發射並著陸可重複使用的 New Glenn 火箭助推器。
